title: Customer Support Specialist
basic: Excellent written and communication skills in both English and German
Prior experience in B2B customer support
Strong troubleshooting skills, a tenacious work ethic, attention to detail, and a curiosity for learning
Passion for customer satisfaction and a deep sense of empathy for technology users
Ability to work weekends as part of a temporary rotation
bonus: Experience or interest in tools like Terminal/iTerm, Github, Zuora, or Zendesk
Knowledge of iOS and Android mobile platforms
Curiosity about AI tools and emerging technologies with a willingness to learn and leverage them

title: Product Support Specialist
basic: 3+ years of experience in a technical support, product support, or related role
Strong understanding of customer support principles, methodologies, and best practices
Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and troubleshooting skills for complex technical issues
Strong communication skills (written and verbal) to convey technical information to diverse audiences
Demonstrated ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams and influence stakeholders
Experience with data analysis, reporting, and using trends to drive process improvements
Familiarity with support ticketing systems, CRM tools, and other relevant support technologies
Willingness to participate in on-call support for incident management
bonus: Experience using SQL or Python for problem-solving and dashboarding
